title: Gaia--HST validation workflow for globular-cluster proper-motion dispersion profiles
description: Open MATLAB workflow, input tables, archived output CSV files, and metadata for validating Gaia EDR3 and HST/HACKS proper-motion dispersion profiles of Galactic globular clusters in their common radial domain.
